creator: bkidney@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 242471
Xorg Log File From Panic

After updating my Framework Laptop (Intel Tiger Lake) I get a kernel panic when trying to start sddm (for KDE). From the X11 logs it looks to be happening when glamoregl is loaded.


--- Crash Info ---

Dump header from device: /dev/nvd0p3
  Architecture: amd64
  Architecture Version: 2
  Dump Length: 1654853632
  Blocksize: 512
  Compression: none
  Dumptime: 2023-05-28 22:57:03 -0230
  Hostname: river
  Magic: FreeBSD Kernel Dump
  Version String: FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT #19 main-n263228-9ed4ec4ae34a: Sun May 28 19:00:07 NDT 2023
    bkidney@river:/var/build/bkidney/obj/usr/home/bkidney/projects/freebsd/freebsd-src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERI
  Panic String: _cv_timedwait_sbt: not TDS_RUNNING
  Dump Parity: 381242441
  Bounds: 2
  Dump Status: good



--- Additional Info ---

All packages have been updated after reboot using:

pkg upgrade -f
